what_it_does: A fast read-only census (2026-06-08, 106 files) of the front-end region (canvas/), the design substrate (design/), and the declarative panels (panels/): a compressed directory tree, a file-by-file inventory table with PRIORITY and notes, key findings per subsystem, a top-10 priority list, and the documented extend-points (token/address/component/panel extension + the design-lint gate).
observations: Maps the F0-restructured FE: App.tsx (carved from a 1659-line Hud), useAppController.ts (single state container, ~37 useState), api.ts, registryStore.ts, NodeShape.tsx (one generic data-driven node shape), AppContext.ts, and 19 region components
Documents kit.tsx (WAVE-2) as the shared vocabulary (SectionHead/LaneHead/Badge/Surface) for recognition-by-shape+tint, token-only

Maps the design substrate: tokens.json (WARM GOLD theme, source of truth) → emit.py → design-system.css (GENERATED, never edit); addresses.json (the ui:// registry); register.json (production contract); the free structural tools check.py/refcheck.py/symbols.py/codeedges.py
Documents the blueprint (B1) build-to-schema philosophy and surfaces/J*/**.json journey-routed surface specs (J1–J9 + _unrouted)
Marks every generated _system/*.json file as do-not-edit (element-map, check-report, code-symbols, code-edges)
Documents the CSS-grid shell over tldraw (canvas cell pointer-events:none, chrome cells re-enable) and the F5 api error-normalization (jr/json-or-error)
Top-10 priority list led by App.tsx, useAppController.ts, design/CLAUDE.md, conventions.md, tokens.json, addresses.json
Documents the design-lint gate command: check.py --target canvas/app/src --fail-on (blocks build per AGENTS rule 9)
standouts: The carved-from-monolith FE structure (App.tsx + useAppController + 19 regions) as the F0 deliverable shape
The extend-by-registration pattern across tokens/addresses/components/surfaces, with the generated-vs-source distinction (tokens.json source → design-system.css generated)
The free structural-tools chain (check/refcheck/symbols/codeedges) that indexes code refs and lints off-token literals
conventions: Consistent PRIORITY column (YES/MAYBE/NO) with NO reserved for generated/built-output files
Explicit GENERATED markers so no agent edits derived files
Documents the extend-by-registration operations (add entry → run generator → reflows) rather than describing files in isolation
notes: If briefing someone: this is the FE-and-design-substrate census — read it to learn the carved FE module layout, the token/address registries and their generators, the blueprint surface specs, and the design-lint gate; note it is a coverage pass, not deep synthesis.
purpose_vs_actual: Match — declares itself a fast read-only coverage pass (location + apparent purpose, no deep synthesis) and delivers that with priority flags, findings, and extend-points.
apparent_themes: source-vs-generated discipline (edit the source, never the emitted file)
registry-as-truth carried into the design substrate
one design language / recognition-by-shape (kit.tsx) and one generic node shape
the FORM gate (design-lint) as a build-blocking enforcement
intention_signals: Trying to give the deep-read planning layer a complete, priority-flagged inventory of the FE and design substrate — the keystone's FE half — so comprehension reads and any surface design compose on the registered token/address/blueprint shapes rather than introducing parallel ones.
contribution: Contributes the FE-and-design-substrate file census: the carved FE module map, the token/address/register/blueprint registry inventory with source-vs-generated tags, the structural-tools chain, and the extend-point operations — the design-side structural index a fused system would keep to navigate and extend the surface.
summary_for_embedding: A fast read-only census of ~/company's FE (canvas/), design substrate (design/), and panels: the carved FE module map, the token/address/register/blueprint registries with source-vs-generated tags, the structural tools, and the design-lint gate, with a top-10 deep-read list.
intention_for_embedding: To give the deep-read planning layer a priority-flagged inventory of the FE and design substrate so reads and surface design compose on the registered token/address/blueprint shapes.
